name: Leader Harmonious Drive Systems Co., Ltd.
summary: Leader Harmonious Drive Systems Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of precision transmission devices. It offers harmonic reducers, mechatronics actuators, and precision parts for use in manufacturing fields, such as industrial robots, service robots, CNC machine tools, aerospace, medical equipment, semiconductor production equipment, and new energy equipment. The company is based in Suzhou, China.
